title: CleanGlass
description:
一个去除玻璃上白点的材质包  
A texture pack that removes white spots from glass
body:
### 中文
- CleanGlass很好地去除了玻璃上的白点，使其看起来更加干净，更加现代化
- 注意：要达成连接纹理的效果，您可能还需要安装Continuity或其它支持连接纹理的mod
- 兼容性：Minecraft 1.16 +
### English
- CleanGlass does a great job of removing white spots from the glass, making it look cleaner and more modern
- Note: To achieve the effect of connected textures, you may also need to install Continuity or other mods that support connected textures
- Compatibility: Minecraft 1.16 +
